L1.area: Software update checking and configuration parsing

L2.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists in the update feed parsing logic. When processing remotely fetched XML update manifests, the XML parser is not configured to disable external entity resolution, allowing an attacker who controls or intercepts the update feed to read arbitrary files or perform server-side request forgery via crafted XML payloads.

L3.area: Software update checking and configuration parsing
L3.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists in the update feed parsing logic. When processing remotely fetched XML update manifests, the XML parser is not configured to disable external entity resolution, allowing an attacker who controls or intercepts the update feed to read arbitrary files or perform server-side request forgery via crafted XML payloads.

ground_truth.reason: The XML parser used to process remote update feed responses is instantiated without disabling external entity resolution, allowing XXE attacks when an attacker controls or intercepts the update manifest.
